responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix automatic owner sign-in on cold launch so the owner login screen appears every time the app starts, then build and ship a new APK proving it

## Constraints & Preferences
- ONLY the existing Expo React Native app is approved — no separate Kotlin app, no second Expo project, no replacement shell
- Approved Android package: `com.ivxholdings.app` (NOT `com.rork.ivxholdings` — that Kotlin app is frozen)
- Use `bun x` not `npx` (npx not allowed in sandbox)
- Never ask user for credentials — find them in project or work around blocker
- No secret values in logs, screenshots, reports — redact all tokens/keys
- Owner email: `iperez4242@gmail.com`
- API base: `https://api.ivxholding.com`
- APK download links use `litterbox.catbox.moe` with 24h expiry
- EXPO_TOKEN and EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID are NOT set in sandbox — EAS cloud build blocked, must build locally
- Diagnostic banner must be hidden by default in ALL runtimes, available only through Owner Control → Diagnostics
- Owner AI send button must be disabled until `SIGNED_IN_OWNER` auth state
- Do NOT create new providers or architecture — modify the EXISTING codebase only
- User explicitly said: "Stop comparing against example files" — audit only real files in the repo
- User demanded: exact file, line number, function name, root cause, code change, commit SHA, and APK proving owner login screen appears after every cold launch

## Progress
### Done
- Build 16 APK completed, verified, and uploaded:
  - package `com.ivxholdings.app`, versionCode 16, versionName 1.4.3, 84MB
  - Embedded: API `api.ivxholding.com`, environment `production`, runtime `standalone`
  - Auth fix confirmed in bundle: `"Cold-launch signOut"` string found in `index.android.bundle`
  - Uploaded to `https://litter.catbox.moe/ti5mjx.apk` (24h expiry)
  - Copied to `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build16.apk`
  - `DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json` updated with build 16 details
- Build 16 auth context fixes (still present and working):
  - `initAuth()` rewritten: calls `supabase.auth.signOut({ scope: 'local' })` on cold launch, sets `manualOwnerLoginRef.current = false`
  - `onAuthStateChange` handler: gated by `manualOwnerLoginRef.current` — ignores all session events unless manual login occurred
  - `manualOwnerLoginRef` set unconditionally in `login()`, `loginOwnerPasswordless()`, `verify2FA()`
- Comprehensive audit of existing auth architecture completed per user's explicit file list:
  - Audited: `lib/auth-context.tsx`, `lib/supabase.ts`, `app/_layout.tsx`, every `getSession()` call (15+ sites), every `onAuthStateChange()` call, every `INITIAL_SESSION` usage, every `router.replace()` redirect, every `AsyncStorage` auth restore, `restoreTrustedOwnerSession`, `ownerDirectAccess`, `activateOwnerIPSession`, `refreshSession`, `refetchProfile`, open-access mode
  - **Root cause identified**: The auth context changes from build 16 ARE working correctly — `isAuthenticated` stays `false` on cold launch. The problem is the ROUTER has no auth guard. `app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx` renders the full app regardless of `isAuthenticated`. The login screen only redirects AWAY from login when authenticated, but nothing redirects TO login when unauthenticated.
- Build 17 fix applied — router auth guard added to `app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx`:
  - Added `useEffect` that redirects to `/login` when `!isAuthenticated && !isLoading && !isOpenAccessModeEnabled()`
  - Added loading spinner display while `isLoading` is true
  - Added `redirectAttemptedRef` to prevent duplicate redirects
  - Imports added: `useEffect`, `useRef`, `ActivityIndicator`, `useRouter`, `isOpenAccessModeEnabled`
  - Added `loadingContainer` style to `StyleSheet.create`
- `app.config.ts` bumped to versionCode 17, buildMarker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_15_BUILD_17_AUTH_GUARD`, buildTimestamp `2026-07-15T05:10:00.000000+00:00`
- TypeScript passes clean (0 errors) after build 17 changes
- Build 17 APK built successfully:
  - `expo prebuild --clean --platform android` completed
  - `gradlew :app:assembleRelease` — BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 1m 8s, 397 tasks, 235 executed, 138 from cache
  - package `com.ivxholdings.app`, versionCode 17, versionName 1.4.3, 84MB
  - `TabsLayout` string confirmed in bundle (auth guard code baked in)
  - `Cold-launch signOut` string confirmed in bundle (build 16 auth fix still present)
  - Copied to `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build17.apk`
- Previous build 15 APK at `https://litter.catbox.moe/7s803c.apk` (likely expired)
- Previous build 14 APK at `https://litter.catbox.moe/3cuemj.apk` (expired)
- Watchman disabled (`chmod -x /usr/local/bin/watchman`) — Metro uses polling fallback

### In Progress
- Upload build 17 APK to litterbox — currently failing with 500 Internal Server Error (server-side outage)
- Update `DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json` with build 17 details (pending upload URL)

### Blocked
- **Litterbox.catbox.moe returning 500 Internal Server Error** — cannot upload build 17 APK, tried multiple retries with delays, also tried catbox.moe (returned "Invalid uploader"), transfer.sh (TLS error), 0x0.st (TLS error), file.io (timeout) — all upload services appear to be having an outage
- EXPO_TOKEN not set — EAS cloud build unavailable
- EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID not set — defaults to placeholder
- GitHub token expired (HTTP 401) — cannot push to GitHub repo, Render backend stuck at `0b37191f`
- Real-device testing cannot be done in sandbox — user must test installed APK on physical device

## Key Decisions
- **Root cause was the router, not the auth context**: `app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx` had NO auth guard — the app opened to `/(tabs)/(home)/home` without checking `isAuthenticated`. The build 16 auth context fixes (signOut + manualOwnerLoginRef gate) were working correctly, but the router never checked the auth state.
- Auth guard added to `app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx`: redirects to `/login` when `!isAuthenticated && !isLoading` — this is the single router-level gate that ensures the login screen appears on every cold launch
- Open access mode (`isOpenAccessModeEnabled()`) bypasses the auth guard — only true in development builds, false in production
- Loading spinner shown while `isLoading` is true to prevent flash of tab content before auth state resolves
- `redirectAttemptedRef` prevents duplicate redirect calls and resets when user becomes authenticated
- Cold launch signs out any persisted Supabase session via `signOut({ scope: 'local' })` — owner MUST enter credentials every time
- `manualOwnerLoginRef` is the auth-context-level gate: `onAuthStateChange` ignores all session events unless `manualOwnerLoginRef.current === true`
- No new providers or architecture — all changes are surgical edits to existing files
- Building APK locally via `expo prebuild` + `gradlew assembleRelease` since EAS cloud is blocked

## Next Steps
1. Retry upload of build 17 APK to litterbox (or alternative service) once outage resolves
2. Update `DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json` with build 17 details and download URL
3. User must test build 17 on real device — verify owner login screen appears after cold launch, no automatic sign-in, manual login works, Owner AI works after login

## Critical Context
- Git HEAD SHA: `e3149d5c995d8e3d95a205d9d4ce4ae65a0958f3` (`e3149d5`)
- Build 17 APK at `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build17.apk` (84MB, versionCode 17, NOT yet uploaded)
- Build 16 APK at `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build16.apk` and `https://litter.catbox.moe/ti5mjx.apk` (24h expiry from ~03:50 UTC)
- Litterbox returning 500 errors since ~04:18 UTC — all alternative upload services also failing
- `aapt2` at `/home/user/.gradle/caches/8.14.1/transforms/.../aapt2` for APK verification
- Supabase production URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co` (project ref `kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb`)
- Supabase client `lib/supabase.ts` has `persistSession: true` with AsyncStorage adapter (line 208-210) — the cold-launch `signOut` in `initAuth` clears persistence, the router auth guard enforces the login screen
- `lib/owner-session-resilience.ts` exports `restoreOwnerResilientSession` — NOT called anywhere (all call sites removed)
- `restoreTrustedOwnerSession` defined at line 1411 in `auth-context.tsx` but never called
- Open access mode: `getIVXAccessControlConfig().openAccessEnabled` — false in production, true in development by default
- Metro bundler works with Watchman disabled — uses polling fallback
- Gradle 8.14.3, JDK 17.0.13, Kotlin 2.0.21, Android SDK 35/36 build-tools available

## Relevant Files
- `expo/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx`: **NEW auth guard** — redirects to `/login` when `!isAuthenticated && !isLoading`, shows loading spinner, bypasses for open-access mode
- `expo/lib/auth-context.tsx`: Core auth context — `initAuth()` signs out on cold launch (line 1480-1498), `onAuthStateChange` gated by `manualOwnerLoginRef` (line 1517-1525), `manualOwnerLoginRef` set unconditionally in `login()`/`loginOwnerPasswordless()`/`verify2FA()`
- `expo/app.config.ts`: Expo config — versionCode 17, buildMarker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_15_BUILD_17_AUTH_GUARD`, sourceCommitSha `e3149d5...`
- `expo/lib/supabase.ts`: Supabase singleton — `persistSession: true`, AsyncStorage adapter, `autoRefreshToken: true`, `flowType: 'pkce'`
- `expo/lib/open-access.ts`: `isOpenAccessModeEnabled()` — checks `getIVXAccessControlConfig().openAccessEnabled`, false in production
- `expo/shared/ivx/access-control.ts`: `getIVXAccessControlConfig()` — `openAccessEnabled` false in production, true in dev by default
- `expo/constants/build-info.ts`: Reads build identity from `Constants.expoConfig.extra`
- `expo/components/IVXOwnerAIDiagnostics.tsx`: Accepts `visible`/`onClose` props, Close button
- `expo/app/ivx/chat.tsx`: `diagnosticsBannerVisible` defaults `false`, auth state machine with 6 states, send disabled until `SIGNED_IN_OWNER`
- `expo/lib/runtime-environment.ts`: Bare-workflow detection — `isStandalone` true when `isBare && !devFlag`
- `expo/lib/owner-session-resilience.ts`: SecureStore-based session backup — `restoreOwnerResilientSession` not called anywhere
- `expo/lib/auth-store.ts`: In-memory auth credentials + SecureStore persistence for userId/role
- `expo/lib/admin-access-lock.ts`: Owner email check via `isOwnerAdminEmail()`, production owner `iperez4242@gmail.com`
- `expo/app/_layout.tsx`: Root layout — sets up providers + Stack, no auth check (auth guard is in tabs layout)
- `expo/app/(tabs)/(home)/_layout.tsx`: Home segment Stack layout — no auth check (relies on parent tabs guard)
- `expo/app/login.tsx`: Login screen — redirects to `/(tabs)/(home)/home` when `isAuthenticated` (line 546-574), open-access bypass (line 536-547)
- `DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json`: Currently has build 16 details — needs update for build 17
- `.rork/plans/build-one-unified-ivx-holdings-android-a_1784077962623.plan.md`: Project plan tracking all tasks
